scripts.prepare:web: mkdir -p www www/gamesfx www/astgfx www/newsfx www/newsfxdesigned www/assets/music www/assets/newsfx && cp -f index.html style.css script.js pixiRenderer.js ufo-death-effect.js favicon.png Kaleidoscope_Magic.mp3 reveal1.mp3 reveal2.mp3 reveal3.mp3 reveal4.mp3 taporb.mp3 crystalballfx.mp4 galaxybg1b-h264.mp4 level5-h264.mp4 level8-h264.mp4 level10-h264.mp4 newbossbg.mp4 www/ && if [ -f firebase-config.js ]; then cp -f firebase-config.js www/; fi && cp -f gamesfx/*.mp3 www/gamesfx/ && cp -f newsfx/*.mp3 www/newsfx/ && cp -f newsfxdesigned/*.mp3 www/newsfxdesigned/ && cp -f assets/music/*.mp3 www/assets/music/ && cp -f assets/newsfx/*.mp3 www/assets/newsfx/ && cp -f astgfx/*.png www/astgfx/ && mkdir -p www/vendor && cp -f node_modules/pixi.js/dist/pixi.min.mjs www/vendor/pixi.min.js && cp -f node_modules/pixi.js/dist/pixi.min.mjs www/vendor/pixi.min.mjs && mkdir -p www/vo && (cp -f vo/*.mp3 www/vo/ 2>/dev/null || true) && mkdir -p www/commander && cp -f "local/commander design"/*.jpg www/commander/ && node resizeCommander.js
scripts.cap:init: npx cap init "Poly Oracle" com.polyoracle.app --web-dir www
scripts.cap:sync: npm run prepare:web && npx cap sync ios
scripts.cap:sync:all: npm run prepare:web && npx cap sync
scripts.bootstrap:ios: npm run install:cap && npm run cap:add:ios && npm run cap:sync
